title: Achievements & Daily Challenge
summary: Addictiveness is at 8/10 with room to grow. This day adds an achievement system with unlockable badges and a daily challenge mode that generates a fresh puzzle based on the current date. These features give players a reason to return after completing all story levels.

tasks.description: Achievement system — define 10 achievements with progress tracking. Achievements: First Steps (complete level 1), Circuit Master (complete all 15), Speed Demon (complete any level in < 30s), Perfect Score (3 stars on any level), Star Collector (earn 30 stars), Chapter Champion (complete all of chapter 1/2/3 with 3 stars), Gate Guru (use 5+ gates in one solution), No Hints (complete a level 4+ without hints). Show unlock toast notification.
acceptance_criteria: Toast notification appears when achievement unlocks
Achievements viewable from level select screen

tasks.description: Achievement display — trophy button on level select that opens achievements modal showing all achievements with locked/unlocked state
acceptance_criteria: Trophy button visible on level select
Unlocked show with gold/color and unlock date

tasks.description: Daily Challenge mode — generates a unique puzzle based on the current date seed. 2-3 inputs, 1-2 outputs, random truth table. Shows current date and 'New puzzle every day!' text. Tracks daily streak.
acceptance_criteria: Daily Challenge button on level select
Puzzle changes every day (seeded PRNG from date)
Shows current date on the puzzle

testing_focus: Achievements unlock correctly based on criteria
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
